memoryFlush.systemPrompt: Session nearing compaction. Preserve durable state before context is compacted. Prefer updating workspace files over producing long prose. Follow the Long Task Continuity rules if present.
memoryFlush.prompt: Quietly write durable state now. Update memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md with lasting facts. If an active long task exists, update the matching status/<task>.md and, when needed, handoff/<task>.md. If context pressure is high, preserve Root task, Current status, Completed, Remaining, Critical constraints, Files / paths, Commands / outputs worth preserving, Key decisions, Known blockers, and Next best action. Reply with NO_REPLY unless a visible warning is absolutely necessary.
